title: Cessna 182P Skylane
description: The Cessna 182P Skylane is a popular, American-built, single-engine, high-wing light aircraft introduced in October 1971. It is a four-seat plane
description_full: The Cessna 182P Skylane is a popular, American-built, single-engine, high-wing light aircraft introduced in October 1971. It is a four-seat plane
airframe_notes:
The Cessna 182P Skylane is a popular, American-built, single-engine, high-wing light aircraft introduced in October 1971. It is a four-seat plane known for its reliability, strong performance, versatility, and approachable handling, making it suitable for various missions from local flights to cross-country travel. The 182P model was part of a transition to the “Skylane” name for all subsequent 182s and typically features a Lycoming engine and tricycle landing gear.
Highlights:
NEW PAINT AND INTERIOR
NEW WINDOWS, BRAKES AND TYRES
NEW DUAL ASPIN AVIONICS
BUSH STALL CONVERSION KIT
EXTENDED RANGE FLINT FUEL TANKS
NO DAMAGE HISTORY
WILL BE DELIVERED WITH NEW SPATS
